prose.title: 12n mos
prose.body: The 12N MOS (Military Occupational Specialty) is the Army MOS for Electrician. Soldiers in this MOS are responsible for installing, maintaining, and repairing electrical systems on Army installations. They also work with electrical wiring for buildings, power distribution systems, and generators. Additionally, they may be involved in troubleshooting and repairing various electrical components and equipment.
